case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BERRY, FLORENCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,687.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BERRY, FLORENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
